findings.description: Path template variables in protocols ({theme-name}, {session-id}, {work-id}) lack explicit validation regex constraints, creating defense-in-depth gaps for path traversal.
findings.proposedRule: Protocols with path templates MUST include validation regex (e.g., ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$).

findings.description: Architect critic caught 3 blocking issues (wrong hook mechanism, gitignored learnings, broken constitution promotion contracts) before any implementation started, preventing expensive rework.
findings.proposedRule: Never skip the critic phase, even for obvious designs.

findings.description: sw-learn SKILL.md hit 621 words during build (target ~600 tokens). Required trimming 5 existing sections to 557 words. Budget awareness during writing would have avoided the revision cycle.
findings.proposedRule: Check SKILL.md word count before adding content. Tighten preemptively at 80% budget.

findings.description: gh pr edit fails on repos with Projects Classic enabled due to GraphQL deprecation. Fallback to gh api PATCH endpoint required.
findings.proposedRule: Use gh api for PR updates instead of gh pr edit.

findings.description: Wiring gate verified protocols/learning-lifecycle.md never names specific skills. Consumer-agnostic protocols prevent tight coupling and survive skill renames.
findings.proposedRule: Protocols must not reference specific skills by name.
